settings_dict_desc: Automatically replace shortcut words with long text when typing in chats.
settings_autorun_desc: Automatically start the app when the computer turns on
settings_esc_desc: Press ESC key to hide the window
settings_quit_tray_desc: Pressing the close (X) button will only hide the window
settings_smart_dl_desc: Save files to appropriate Windows folders (Videos, Pictures, etc)
settings_notif_prefix_desc: Prefix text on system notifications (e.g. WhatsZan - New Message)
settings_blur_amount_desc: Adjust how blurry the censor effect is
settings_unblur_delay_desc: Delay before the censor is lifted when hovered. You can enter large numbers (e.g. 60).
settings_blur_specific_desc: If filled, the Contacts List blur above only applies to these names. Separate with commas.
settings_ghost_read_desc: Disables Read Receipts. Others won't know you've read their messages.
settings_ghost_typing_desc: Removes the "Typing..." indicator on the other person's phone.
settings_antidelete_desc: Recovers messages that were deleted/recalled by the sender
settings_statussaver_desc: Shows a 'Save Status' button when viewing friends' Stories
settings_menubar_desc: Shows the application menu at the top of the window
settings_menubar_autohide_desc: The menu bar will only appear when the Alt key is pressed
settings_spellcheck_desc: Red underlines will appear under misspelled words
settings_chrome_ext_desc: Install browser extensions like AdBlock or Grammarly
settings_ua_desc: Device identification string. Leave blank to use default.
